prestazioni: Engine swap to a **BP-ZE (RS) 1.8L DOHC 16V** with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft kit for high-RPM power (rev limit raised to 8,500 RPM via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU).

Forced induction via **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on a custom tubular manifold, paired with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** for 300+ HP on E85 (fuel system upgraded with Walbro 450LPH pump and ID1000 injectors).

Chassis reinforcement with **Cusco 4-point bolt-in roll cage** (ASTINA-specific fitment) and **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (adjusted for -2.5° front camber via **Mazdaspeed camber plates**) to handle 1.2G lateral loads on 245/40R17 Yokohama Advan A052 tires.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit** (JDM-spec, bolt-on overfenders for 15mm wider track) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (BP-ZE heat extraction vents) and **JDM Mazdaspeed rear spoiler** (3-piece, adjustable angle).
OEM+ restomod: **Mazda 323F (BG) Euro-spec clear headlights** (HID projector retrofit with Morimoto D2S 4300K bulbs) and **Mazdaspeed side skirts** (color-matched to Mazda Racing Orange Mica).

Interior: **Bride Zeta III bucket seats** (ASTINA-specific mounting brackets) with **Takata 4-point harnesses**, **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** (Momo quick-release hub), and **Defi BF gauges** (oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted on a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**.
